function buildConfig(adElement, slotId, prefixId) {
	const unitPath = adElement.dataset.unit || '';
	const devicetype = adElement.dataset.devicetype || '';
	const positionType = adElement.dataset.positiontype || '';
	const carouselCount = parseInt(adElement.dataset.carouselcount, 10) || 0;
	const autoSlideDelay = parseInt(adElement.dataset.autoslidedelay, 10) || 10000;

	let sizes;
	try {
	sizes = JSON.parse(adElement.dataset.size || "[]");
	} catch (e) {
	console.error("Invalid size format for ad:", slotId);
	return null;
	}

	return {
	id: slotId,
	prefix: prefixId,
	baseAdUnit: unitPath,
	carouselCount: carouselCount,
	sizes: sizes,
	autoSlideDelay: autoSlideDelay
	};
}

/* ===============================
	BUILD CAROUSEL HTML
================================ */
function buildCarousel(cfg) {
	const el = document.getElementById(cfg.id);
	if (!el) return;

	const count = Number(cfg.carouselCount) || 0;
	el.classList.add('carousel-enabled');

	let maxHeight = 0;
	if (cfg.sizes && cfg.sizes.length > 0) {
	let maxWidth = 0;
	cfg.sizes.forEach(size => {
		if (size[0] > maxWidth) maxWidth = size[0];
		if (size[1] > maxHeight) maxHeight = size[1];
	});

	el.style.maxWidth = maxWidth + 'px';
	el.style.maxHeight = maxHeight + 'px';
	el.style.height = maxHeight + 'px';
	}
	
	if (count <= 1) {
	el.innerHTML = `<div id="${cfg.prefix}-slot-1"></div>`;
	return;
	}

	el.innerHTML = '';
	for (let i = 1; i <= count; i++) {
	el.insertAdjacentHTML(
		'beforeend',
		`<div class="slide" style="height: ${maxHeight}px;"><div id="${cfg.prefix}-slot-${i}"></div></div>`
	);
	}


}

function showSlide(id, n) {
	const el = document.getElementById(id);
	if (!el) return;
	
	const slides = el.querySelectorAll('.slide');
	let state = sliderState[id];
	
	if (n > slides.length) state.index = 1;
	if (n < 1) state.index = slides.length;

	slides.forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));

	if (slides.length > 0) {
	slides[state.index - 1].classList.add('active');
	}
}

function startAutoSlide(id, delay) {
	stopAutoSlide(id);
	sliderState[id].timer = setInterval(() => {
	sliderState[id].index++;
	showSlide(id, sliderState[id].index);
	}, delay);
}

function stopAutoSlide(id) {
	if (sliderState[id] && sliderState[id].timer) {
	clearInterval(sliderState[id].timer);
	}
}

window.stopAutoSlide = stopAutoSlide;

/* shorts page css */
.stories-list {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 30px auto;
  padding: 0;
  overflow-x: auto;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-align: center;
}
.stories-list .storie-item {
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: top;
  width: 18%;
  border-radius: 8px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 0 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: unset;
  position: relative;
  --bs-aspect-ratio: calc(6 / 4 * 100%);
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture::before {
  display: block;
  padding-top: var(--bs-aspect-ratio);
  content: "";
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture > * {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture img {
  width: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: unset;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .text-part {
  background: linear-gradient(
    0deg,
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8),
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6),
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0),
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.21),
    rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.66)
  );
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .text-part .past-stories {
  display: flex;
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 8px;
  left: 6px;
  right: 6px;
  z-index: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .text-part .past-stories span {
  height: 2px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background-color: #fff;
  opacity: 0.4;
  margin-right: 3px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 5px;
  margin-left: 3px;
  flex: 1;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .text-part .past-stories span.active {
  opacity: 1;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .icon-part {
  height: 30px;
  width: 30px;
  margin: 14px;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .picture .icon-part img {
  height: 30px;
  width: 30px;
}
.stories-list .storie-item .title {
  color: #000000;
  font-family: "Merriweather", serif;
  letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 15px 3px 0;
  position: relative;
  bottom: 10px;
  line-height: normal;
  white-space: normal;
}
.stories-list.inner-page {
  overflow-x: unset;
  white-space: unset;
  margin: unset;
  padding: unset;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0px 10px 10px 10px;
}
.stories-list.inner-page .storie-item {
  margin: 0px 8px 10px 8px;
  width: 100%;
}

.box-line-title .shorts {
  font-size: 30px;
  top: 0px;
}

/** Mobile Responsive Styles **/
@media screen and (max-width: 570px) {
  .stories-list {
    margin: 20px auto 10px;
    padding-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .stories-list .storie-item {
    width: 150px;
    margin: 0 3px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    vertical-align: top;
  }
  .stories-list .storie-item .text-part .title {
    font-size: 9px;
    text-align: left;
    padding: 5px 5px 0;
    bottom: 5px;
  }
  .stories-list .storie-item .picture .past-stories span {
    width: 5.6px;
    margin-right: 0px;
  }
  .stories-list .storie-item .picture .icon-part {
    height: 20px;
    width: 20px;
    margin: 0px 5px;
  }
  .stories-list .storie-item .picture .icon-part img {
    height: 20px;
    width: 20px;
  }
  .stories-list.inner-page .storie-item {
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0;
  }
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_ltug] {
    --cx-columns: 4;
   --cx-rows: 2;
  --cx-item-gap: 4px;
    --cx-image-height: 220px;
    --cx-background-color: #FFF;
    --cx-text-color: #555;
    --cx-text-hover-color: #000;
    --cx-font-size: 15px;
    --cx-font-family: 'Roboto', arial, helvetica, sans-serif;
    --cx-item-width: calc(100% / var(--cx-columns));
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    justify-content: space-evenly;
    background: var(--cx-background-color);
    padding: var(--cx-item-gap);
}

.cx-flex-module{
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss {
     width: 23%;
    margin: 0 1%;
    flex-grow: 1;
    display: block;
    text-decoration: none;
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(1), .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(4) {
  /*margin-left:0;*/
}
.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(4), .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(8) {
  /*margin-right:0;*/
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss.text-only {
    background: #FAFAFA;
    padding: 15px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    background: #EFEFEF;
}
/**f
.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss h3 {
    font-family: var(--cx-font-family);
    font-size: var(--cx-font-size);
    font-weight: bold;
    color: var(--cx-text-color);
    line-height: 1.3;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
}
**/
.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss.text-only span {
    font-family: var(--cx-font-family);
    font-size: 90%;
    color: var(--cx-text-color);
    filter: opacity(0.5);
    margin: 5px 0;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:hover {
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:hover h3 {
    color: #000000;
}
 .title-div:hover{
      text-decoration: underline;
}

        font-size: 16px;
    }

    width: 100%;
    margin: 0%;
  }
}

  .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(2) .picture-div, .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(3) .picture-div, .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:nth-child(4) .picture-div  {
    
   }
   
   .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss .element-div  {
    
      border-bottom: 1px solid #dddddd;
      padding: 10px 0;
      min-height: 120px;
      position: relative;
    }
   .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:last-child .element-div  {
      border-bottom: none;
      padding-bottom: 0;
    }
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:first-child .element-div  {
       padding-top: 0;
     }
    
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss .picture-div{
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      left: 0;
      --bs-aspect-ratio: calc(1 / 1 * 100%);
      margin: 0;
      width: 100px;
    }
    .title-div {
      font-size: 16px;
    }
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss .title-div{
      margin: 0 0;
      margin-left: 112px;
    }
    
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:first-child .title-div{
      margin: 10px 0 0;
    }
    
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss:first-child .picture-div{
      position: relative;
      top: 00px;
      left: 0;
      --bs-aspect-ratio: calc(9 / 16 * 100%);
      margin: 0px 0 10px;
      width: 100%;
    }
}

/* IE10+ */
@media screen\0 {
    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] {

    }

    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss h3 {

        color: #000;
    }

    .cx-flex-module[data-cx_v8wr] .cx-item-incase-you-miss.text-only span {

        color: #AAA;

}

  requirejs(['jquery','bootstrap'], function ($) {
	// Cache jQuery selectors for better performance
	var $sideMenu = $(".comments-chat-side-menu");
	var $subscriptionCard = $(".subscription-card");
	var $header = $(".header");
	var $body = $("body");
	var $userEmailDisplay = $("#userEmailDisplay");
	
	// Track if user state has been initialized (lazy init on first account click)
	var userStateInitialized = false;

  // LOADER FUNCTIONS
	function showLoader() {
		$("#pageLoader").fadeIn(200);
	}

	function hideLoader() {
		$("#pageLoader").fadeOut(200);
	}

	// LOGIN (no subscription yet)
	$(".btn-signup").on("click", function (e) {
		e.preventDefault();
		$(".header")
		.removeClass("logged-out subscribed")
		.addClass("logged-in");
		$(".subscription-card")
		.removeClass("active-subscription")
		.addClass("no-subscription");
	});


  // Function to update subscription state based on actual user status
  function updateSubscriptionState() {
    if (typeof tp !== 'undefined' && tp.pianoId && tp.user && tp.user.isUserValid()) {
      try {
        if (typeof userIdentify !== 'undefined') {
          userIdentify.then(function () {
            if (typeof isNonSubcribedUser === 'function' && !isNonSubcribedUser()) {
              $subscriptionCard
                .removeClass("no-subscription")
                .addClass("active-subscription");
            } else {
              $subscriptionCard
                .removeClass("active-subscription")
                .addClass("no-subscription");
            }
          });
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.log('Error checking subscription status:', error);
      }
    }
  }

  function updateUserEmail() {
    // Update user email if tp is available and user is logged in
    if (typeof tp !== 'undefined' && tp.pianoId && tp.user && tp.user.isUserValid()) {
      try {
        var userDetails = tp.pianoId.getUser();
        if (userDetails && userDetails.email) {
          $userEmailDisplay.text(userDetails.email);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.log('Error getting user email:', error);
        $userEmailDisplay.text('User logged in');
      }
    }
  }

  // ACCOUNT CLICK (logged out view + open comments)
  $(".btn-account").on("click", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    showLoader();
    setTimeout(() => {  // Simulate loading time for better UX
    $header
      .removeClass("logged-in subscribed")
      .addClass("logged-out");

    if (!$sideMenu.hasClass("show-comments")) {
      $sideMenu.addClass("show-comments");
      // addClass is idempotent — safe even if hamburger already added stop-scroll
      $body.addClass("stop-scroll");
    }
    
    // Initialize user state only on first account click (lazy initialization)
    if (!userStateInitialized) {
      userStateInitialized = true;
      updateUserEmail();
      updateSubscriptionState();
    } else {
      // On subsequent clicks, just update email in case it changed
      updateUserEmail();
    }
    hideLoader(); }, 500);
  });


  // Close popup handlers - use event delegation for better performance
  $sideMenu.on("click touchstart", ".comments-close, .comments-overlay", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    
    if ($sideMenu.hasClass("show-comments")) {
      $sideMenu.removeClass("show-comments");
      // Only remove scroll lock if hamburger menu is also closed
      if (!$(".menu-btn").hasClass("opened")) {
        $body.removeClass("stop-scroll");
      }
    }
  });

  $sideMenu.on("click touchstart", function (e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
  });

  // Logout button handler
  $("#logoutBtn").on("click", function (e) {
    if (typeof tp !== 'undefined' && tp.pianoId) {
      console.log('Logging out user via pianoId');
      tp.pianoId.logout();
    }
  });

 });

Nehru inaugurated the new bus-stand at Sankarankovil and spruced-up bus terminus at Vasudevanallur and the Gandhi daily market at Puliyangudi in the district on Monday.</p><div class="article-ad"><div class="dfp-ad articleinlinead  middleonead" id="Desktop_AT_Mid01" style="min-height: 90px;" data-google-query-id="COSD9pO-3ZQDFe_TwgQd0AQakQ"><div id="google_ads_iframe_/22390678/TH_Desktop_AT_Mid01_0__container__" style="border: 0pt; width: 728px; height: 0px;"></div></div></div><p>While bus terminus at Sankarankovil has been built at the cost of ₹9 crore, the Vasudevanallur bus stand has been renovated on an outlay of ₹1.08 crore.      else{

   if ("IntersectionObserver" in window) {
    let optionsItersect = {

  threshold: 0
}
     let lazyContentObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries, optionsItersect) {
       entries.forEach(function(entry) {
         if (entry.isIntersecting) {
           let lazycontent = entry.target;

           let fragmentUrl =  lazycontent.dataset.fragmentUrl;
           
           fetch(fragmentUrl).then(function(response) {
            if(response.ok && (response.status >= 200 &&  response.status < 400)) {        
                return response.text();
            }
        }).then(function(resp) {
           if(typeof resp !="undefined"){

            lazyContentObserver.unobserve(lazycontent);

        }).catch(function(error) {
          console.error(error)
        });
           
         }
       });
     });
 
     fragmentcontent.forEach(function(content) {
      lazyContentObserver.observe(content);
     });

      ads.forEach((ad, index) => {

        let triggerMultiple = parseFloat(ad.dataset.trigger) || 1.2;
        let triggerPoint = window.innerHeight * triggerMultiple;

        if (!triggered.has(index) && scrollY >= triggerPoint) {
          triggered.add(index);
         
          let slotId = ad.id || `gpt-ad-${index}`;

          let carouselenable = ad.dataset.carousel;
          let carouselCount = parseInt(ad.dataset.carouselcount, 10) || 0;
          let autoSlideDelay = parseInt(ad.dataset.autoslidedelay, 10) || 10000;
          let sizes;
          try {
            sizes = JSON.parse(ad.dataset.size || "[]");
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Invalid size format for ad:", slotId);
            return;
          }userIdentify.then(function() {googletag.cmd.push(function () {
          let slot;
          if (typeof positionType !== "undefined" && positionType.trim() !== "") {
              if (isDeviceEnabled(devicetype)) {
                  slot = googletag.defineOutOfPageSlot(unitPath, googletag.enums.OutOfPageFormat[positionType])
              }
              if (slot) {
                slot.addService(googletag.pubads());
                googletag.display(slot);
              }
            }else if (typeof carouselenable !== "undefined" && carouselenable === "true" && typeof carouselCount !== "undefined" && carouselCount > 0) {
              // Carousel logic for defineSlot (inline ads)
              const cfg = {
                id: slotId,
                prefix: `carousel-${index}`,
                baseAdUnit: unitPath,
                carouselCount: carouselCount,
                sizes: sizes,
                autoSlideDelay: autoSlideDelay
              };
              
              sliders.push(cfg);
              
              // Build carousel only for carouselCount > 1
              if (cfg.carouselCount > 1) {
                buildCarousel(cfg);
                
                // Define carousel slots
                for (let i = 1; i <= cfg.carouselCount; i++) {
                  const adUnit = `${unitPath}_Slide${i}`;
                  googletag.defineSlot(
                    adUnit,
                    sizes,
                    `${cfg.prefix}-slot-${i}`
                  )
                  .addService(googletag.pubads())
                  .setTargeting('position', cfg.id)
                  .setTargeting('slide', String(i));
                }
                
                // Display carousel slots
                for (let i = 1; i <= cfg.carouselCount; i++) {
                  googletag.display(`carousel-${index}-slot-${i}`);
                }
                
                // Setup carousel controls
                sliderState[cfg.id] = { index: 1, timer: null };
                showSlide(cfg.id, 1);
                startAutoSlide(cfg.id, cfg.autoSlideDelay);
                
                const el = document.getElementById(cfg.id);
                if (el) {
                  el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => stopAutoSlide(cfg.id));
                  el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => startAutoSlide(cfg.id, cfg.autoSlideDelay));
                }
              } else {
                // Single slot for non-carousel ads
                if (isDeviceEnabled(devicetype)) {
                  slot = googletag.defineSlot(unitPath, sizes, slotId);
                  if (slot) {
                    slot.addService(googletag.pubads());
                    googletag.display(slotId);
                  }
                }
              }
            }else{
              if (isDeviceEnabled(devicetype)) {
              slot = googletag.defineSlot(unitPath, sizes, slotId)
              }
              if (slot) {
                slot.addService(googletag.pubads());
                googletag.display(slotId);
              }
            }
          });});}
      });
		});
  }

          });

    function parseJwt (token) {
        var base64Url = token.split('.')[1];
        var base64 = base64Url.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
        var jsonPayload = decodeURIComponent(window.atob(base64).split('').map(function(c) {
            return '%' + ('00' + c.charCodeAt(0).toString(16)).slice(-2);
        }).join(''));

        return JSON.parse(jsonPayload);
    }

    const gsi_container = document.getElementById("g_id_onload")
    const auth_ep = "https://madhyama.thehindu.com/api/gni";
    const response_ep = "https://madhyama.thehindu.com/api/sociallogin"

    function logMomentNotification(v) {
      console.log(v);
      // const gsi_overlay = document.getElementById("gsi_overlay")
      if(v === "display") {
        // gsi_overlay.style.display = "block";

        dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
        dataLayer.push ({
          'event' : 'onetap_signin',
          'data' : {
            'click':'view',
            'click_type' : '',
            'general_placement':'body',
            'detailed_placement':'',
            'goal_type':'onetap_signin_view'
          }
        });
      }
      // else gsi_overlay.style.display = "none"
    }

    function loginCallback(res) {
      handleGoogleSignIn()
    }

    function pushLoginEventToDataLayer() {
      dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      dataLayer.push ({
        'event' : 'onetap_signin',
        'data' : {
          'click':'sign_in',
          'click_type' : 'action',
          'general_placement':'body',
          'detailed_placement':'',
          'goal_type':'onetap_signin'
        }
      });
    }

    function handleGoogleSignIn(user) {
      console.log('handleGoogleSignIn');
      const clean_url = cleanArticleUrl();
      const options = {
        method: "POST",
        headers: getHeaders(),
        body: JSON.stringify({
          "token": user.credential,
          "article_url": clean_url,
          "pubId": "TH",
        })
      };

      fetch(auth_ep, options)
      .then(function(res) {
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(res.statusText)
        return res.json()
      })
      .then(function(res) {
        if (res.redirect_uri) {
          pushLoginEventToDataLayer();
          setTimeout(() => {
            window.location.replace(res.redirect_uri);
          }, 0200);
        }
        else if (!res.token || res.token.trim() === "") return
        else if(res.token && window.tp.pianoId)
          tp.push(['init', function() {
            pushLoginEventToDataLayer();
            try {
              let parsedToken = parseJwt(res.token)
              dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
              dataLayer.push ({
                'event' : 'login_successful',
                'data' : {
                  'onetap_signin': 'yes',
                  'email': parsedToken.email,
                  'uid': parsedToken.sub,
                  'platform': 'WEB'
                }
              });
             } catch (error) {
              console.log("onetap-signin-err", error);
             }
             tp.pianoId.loginByToken(res.token);
            setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 0700);
          }])
        else {
          console.log("Nothing happened...")
        }
      })
      .catch(err => console.error(err));
    }

    function cleanArticleUrl() {
      const params_to_remove = ["utm_source", "utm_medium", "utm_campaign", "utm_term", "utm_content"]

      const url_obj = new URL(`${window.location.href}`)
      url_obj.searchParams.forEach((v, k) =>
        {if (params_to_remove.includes(k)) url_obj.searchParams.delete(k)}
      )

      return url_obj.toString()
    }

    function handleResponseUrl() {
      const url_obj = new URL(window.location.href)
      const response_id = url_obj.searchParams.get("response_id")
      const redirect_uri = url_obj.searchParams.get("internal_redirect_uri")
      if (!response_id || !redirect_uri) {
        google?.accounts.id.prompt((d) => {
          logMomentNotification(d.getMomentType());
        });
        return
      }
       // If user is already logged in, Do nothing with response_id or redirect_uri
      // else if (window.tp && window.tp.pianoId.isUserValid()) return;

      const options = {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: getHeaders(),
        body: JSON.stringify({
            "response_id": response_id,
            "pubId": "TH"
        })
      }

      fetch(response_ep, options)
      .then(function(res) {
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(res.statusText)
        return res.json()
      })
      .then(function(res) {
        console.log(res)
        // return if response is not ok OR no access token is present
        if (!res.data.status === "ok" || !res.data.access_token) return
        if(window.tp.pianoId)
          tp.push(['init', function() {
             try {
              let parsedToken = parseJwt(res.data.access_token)
              dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
              dataLayer.push ({
                'event' : 'login_successful',
                'data' : {
                  'onetap_signin': 'yes',
                  'email': parsedToken.email,
                  'uid': parsedToken.sub,
                  'platform': 'WEB'
                }
              });
             } catch (error) {
                console.log("onetap-signin-err", error);
             }
            tp.pianoId.loginByToken(res.data.access_token)
            setTimeout(function() {
              window.location.replace(res.data.redirect_uri)
            }, 1000);
          }])
        else window.location.replace(res.data.redirect_uri)
      })
      .catch(err => console.error("Error: ", err));
    }

    function getHeaders() {
      return {
        "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",
        "Authorization": "Basic dGhlaGluZHU6a251cl9DSC1BNVBZVSU4Vw==",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      }
    }
